purpose: Find a stronger tape-independent reference calendar cheaply and determine, before any W24 transducer batch, whether it could possibly yield an oracle-minus-reference UCB95 below 0.01.
scientific_scope: Comparator development on burned calibration tapes followed by one diagnostic evaluation on burned locked tapes. This screen cannot estimate the full oracle, H_PI or H_obs and cannot authorize a positive claim.

candidate_family.single_excursion: For action T and action R, replace one contiguous all-M interval whose start is in weeks 1..22 and whose inclusive end is at least start+1 and at most 23.
candidate_family.why_feasible: Every excursion has length at least two, so neither the switch away from M nor the switch back to M occurs in adjacent active weeks.
candidate_family.enumeration_order: constant M first, then action T followed by R, then increasing start, then increasing inclusive end

locked_diagnostic.context_rule: CONTEXTS[(seed-1110001) mod 3], preserving the original 120-tape rotation after excluding development seed 1110001
locked_diagnostic.logic: The full feasible oracle contains the selected reference and every constant, so oracle-reference is pointwise at least L_tape. If the common-resample UCB95 of L_tape is already at or above 0.01, this reference cannot support a below-gate oracle ceiling and no W24 computation should be launched for it.

resource_diagnostic.warning: Reserve issue, replenishment, requests and terminal stock are policy-dependent outcomes and are retained per policy. Constants are not declared componentwise resource-matched; including them only creates a lower envelope for precluding one selected reference and cannot support a positive comparison.

decision_rules.reference_precluded: If locked lower-bound UCB95 is at least 0.01, reject only this selected reference as mathematically incapable of closing M/T/R.
decision_rules.reference_candidate_only: If locked lower-bound UCB95 is below 0.01, the reference remains eligible for a later exact oracle-minus-reference calculation; it does not itself close anything.
